notes: Załącznik do obwieszczenia Ministra Zdrowia z dnia 17 marca 2026 r. (effective 1 April 2026). Multi-sheet XLSX with 11 lists (A1, A2, A3, B, C, D1, D2, E, F2, G1, G2). Sheet A1 (community-pharmacy reimbursable medicines) is the primary one for cross-country pricing comparison. Each row has four price columns: Cena zbytu netto (manufacturer net), Urzędowa cena zbytu (official sale price = net + VAT), Cena hurtowa brutto (wholesale gross including VAT), Cena detaliczna (retail).
